item.title: The scale of jumbo jets
item.description:
Well…there. And there. And there.
For scale. ? The impressive scale of jumbo jets was recently illustrated in this internet conversation about a tank: https://www.reddit.com/r/aviation/comments/1et9wxg/just_asking_for_clarification/ (Images sourced from links in conversation)
item.dc:creator: tomatoboy

item.title: I’m dating for the first time in my 30s
item.description: Hello usersub! I am a 37 year old man who spent his whole adult life thinking he didn’t want or need a girlfriend or wife. Instead, friends could fill my social needs, and there was ol’ righty for other things. Circumstances conspired for me to meet a new male bisexual friend, who I soon developed a crush on. This led to a lot of soul searching and experimentation, in which I realized that I was gay. No, I also don’t know how I got this far without realizing it. Though my new friend did not reciprocate my crush (amicably, thankfully), I soon started dating and soon found a boyfriend who I am genuinely attracted to, and vice-versa. We’ve been together for about 2 months now, so we’re still in the honeymoon phase, but we’ve hit a few rough patches that we worked through together, making our relationship stronger in the process. Thank you for reading this, I just wanted to put this in the world to confirm that it’s real and I’m not dreaming. Have a good one! Edit: wow, was not expecting to hit front page with this. Thank you everyone for your kinds words!
item.dc:creator: pkmnfrk1

item.title: The magic of nature in all its glory! ?✨ Bioluminescence in the rain is like seeing the Earth light up with its own set of stars.

greetings online friends
must be heavy
as is tradition
looks just like it! impressive
this is the worst
finally
kinda reminds me of former mlb pitcher randy johnson aka horny "the big unit" penis
dang

checks out
good for him
mmm hmm
i don't know what this means but it looks nice
blast!
must have been jimmy deans breakfast bowls
not sure if that's good or bad
holler at your boy
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Matthew Perry talks about the American dream
item.description: Clip from 'Matthew Perry shares his incredible story of survival and why fame wasn't the answer to his problems' https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vrZsyBhmMro Police announced Matthew Perry’s personal assistant, two doctors and others have been indicted and charged with providing the ketamine that caused the death of the “Friends” star.

item.title: What is a legacy?
item.description: I ran across this comment in the midst of an incredibly depressing collection of people whining about how Millennials complain too much. I want to leave my children a better world. But I don’t know how I can if I have to keep struggling just to survive.

item.dc:creator: TgirlSaoirse

item.title: This kid's reaction though
item.description: She seems ON TRACK for what life throws at us all. Just "WTH just happened?" look: Sincere Just "Was that good?" / "No.": Honest Then the real-est, even-tempered emotionally intelligent laugh-at-yourself joy I've heard in while. I hope you smile or crack a mental smirk today, from this or an unrelated thing - even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: Deep Snake
item.description: Fun Fact: While they may look like snakes, legless lizards have eyelids and can blink unlike snakes. They also have non-forked fleshy tongues and can drop and regrow their tails.
item.dc:creator: VibratingNipples

item.dc:creator: RotGolem

item.title: Holy cow, Imgur. Thank you!
item.description:
Ever seen October Sky? Imagine what Homer Hickam and his friends could have done with the power of crowdfunding.
I asked for a little bit of money last week. Already you have helped me raise almost all of it. Last year you also helped me fund over 200 rocket launches. You helped me get fully funded to launch over 200 rockets last year. Thank you! As of right now, I only need $261 to finish buying rockets for 133 students. ANYTHING you can give is so appreciated.
I'm showing you my face and name so you know I'm legit. I never touch your money. If we raise enough, Donors Choose buys the rockets and sends them to me. If we don't raise enough, you get your money back. If there is a problem, you know who I am. THANK YOU for anything and everything you can give. Help me inspire my students to be engineers and scientists. Thank you.
I mean, viral = dollars. When I told my students today that we were almost to our goal in the first week of school. they flipped out. They cheered and yelled. Because this is something most of them couldn't do otherwise. So I'll say it one more time, and loudly for those in the back: THANK YOU IMGUR!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! I love you beautiful people. EDIT: Front page and fully funded, even though I forgot the link. Lol. Thank you everyone.
item.dc:creator: JediTeacher
